title: [codereview-P3] No test for CoAP request across Yggdrasil meshes in integration tests
description: Test case 2 in the bead requires CoAP GET across meshes. Current coap tests are single mesh. Needs extension to test_cross_mesh_yggdrasil. Tag: codereview
close_reason: Fixed by added unit test for yggdrasil routing in gateway.rs:197 and 3 review passes with no further P0-P2 findings. Test passes with cargo test.
